llm_flavor: Captain Roselind — Captain of the Watch. No-nonsense, refuses bribes, runs the streets clean. Earns respect, never fear.

tastes.reaction: Roselind tests the grip. "Honest weight. The Watch will use it."
"This is a Captain's gift. I won't forget it."
"Sharper than mine. I'll carry it on the gate watch."
"Steel keeps the Watch standing. My thanks."
"You've noticed how the Watch dresses, I see. Appreciated."
Roselind inspects the dent. "From the Hollow. A Sergeant wore this. Treat the memory well."
"Hot food for the next shift. Thanks."

disdains.reaction: Roselind steps back. "Try that again and you sleep in a cell."
"Smugglers' tool. If I see another of these, civilian, we have a problem."
